description: Ranks passenger-car brands by average braked towing capacity for current tow-capable cars. Use for best tow-car brands, trailers, or caravan use. Excludes brands with fewer than 100 tow-capable cars.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL | EVAL braked_towing_weight = CLAMP(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTilkoblingsvaegtMedBremser, 0, 5000) | WHERE braked_towing_weight > 0 | STATS tow_capable_cars = COUNT(*), avg_braked_towing_weight = AVG(braked_towing_weight), p90_braked_towing_weight = PERCENTILE(braked_towing_weight, 90), max_braked_towing_weight = MAX(braked_towing_weight) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | WHERE tow_capable_cars >= 100 | SORT avg_braked_towing_weight DESC, tow_capable_cars DESC | LIMIT 30
